queryParams.filtering: Use field name as query param: ?fieldName=value

aeatsiiFechaRegCont.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN ((SELECT c.insiisystem FROM aeatsii_config c WHERE c.ad_org_id = (SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE') FROM dual))='Y' AND (SELECT c.posted_invoices FROM aeatsii_config c WHERE c.ad_org_id = (SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE') FROM dual))='Y') THEN null ELSE now() END FROM dual

aeatsiiClaveTipoFc.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN ((SELECT c.insiisystem FROM aeatsii_config c WHERE c.ad_org_id = (SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE') FROM dual))='Y') THEN 'F1' ELSE null END FROM dual

aeatsiiPurDescription.defaultValue:
@SQL=
	SELECT
		CASE
			WHEN
				(
					(
						SELECT c.insiisystem
						FROM aeatsii_config c
						WHERE c.ad_org_id = (
							SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE')
							FROM dual
						)
					)='Y'
				)
			THEN
				(
					SELECT
						(
							CASE
								WHEN (@issotrx@ = 'Y')
								THEN (null)
								ELSE (
									SELECT aeatsii_description_id
									FROM aeatsii_description
									WHERE isdefault = 'Y'
									AND ispurchase = 'Y'
									AND ad_org_id = @AD_Org_ID@
									AND ad_client_id = @ad_client_id@
								)
							END
						)
					FROM dual
				)
			ELSE null
		END
	FROM dual

aeatsiiDescripcionSii.defaultValue:
@SQL=
	SELECT
		CASE
			WHEN
				(
					(
						SELECT c.insiisystem
						FROM aeatsii_config c
						WHERE c.ad_org_id = (
							SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE')
							FROM dual
						)
					)='Y'
				)
			THEN
				(
					SELECT
						(
							CASE
								WHEN(@issotrx@ = 'Y')
								THEN (
									SELECT description
									FROM aeatsii_description
									WHERE isdefault = 'Y'
									AND issales = 'Y'
									AND ad_org_id = @AD_Org_ID@
									AND ad_client_id = @ad_client_id@
								) ELSE (
									SELECT description
									FROM aeatsii_description
									WHERE isdefault = 'Y'
									AND ispurchase = 'Y'
									AND ad_org_id = @AD_Org_ID@
									AND ad_client_id = @ad_client_id@
								)
							END
						)
					FROM dual
				)
			ELSE null
		END
	FROM dual

aeatsiiEstado.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT CASE WHEN ((SELECT c.insiisystem FROM aeatsii_config c WHERE c.ad_org_id = (SELECT ad_get_org_le_bu(@AD_Org_ID@,'LE') FROM dual))='Y') THEN 'PE' ELSE null END FROM dual

lineNo.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_INVOICETAX WHERE C_Invoice_ID=@C_Invoice_ID@
@SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(LINE),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_INVOICE_DISCOUNT WHERE C_INVOICE_ID=@C_INVOICE_ID@

agentProfile.purpose: Create and manage purchase invoice documents.
whenToUse: Use for supplier purchase invoice before receipt or invoice.
workflow: Create draft header with required fields
Add at least one valid line
edgeCases: Source document has no valid lines to copy
Target entity already has linked records
Required reference data is missing (price list, warehouse, etc.)
Payment amount exceeds remaining balance
Payment method is not configured for the business partner
Invoice is already fully paid
Document is already completed or closed
Document has pending lines or missing required fields
User lacks permission to execute the action
Required context is missing

examples.description: Create a draft header with the minimum required editable fields.
Add a line after the header exists and parent context is available.
Validate form state and run the document lifecycle action when the draft is complete.
